overview.description: The Schwab Government Money Market ETF (SGVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund aiming to provide a cash management tool. The fund invests in ultra-short term government securities, aiming to maximize current income and capital preservation. SGVT was launched on Jun 12, 2025 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
